mapper.select: SELECT * FROM class_info ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_info (name, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM user u INNER JOIN user_class uc ON u.id = uc.user_id WHERE uc.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY u.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_class (user_id, class_id, role, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{classId}, #{role}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_class WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND class_id = #{classId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM class_info c INNER JOIN user_class uc ON c.id = uc.class_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
